query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_leaks,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name = 'Test Leak' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS test_leaks,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name != 'Test Leak' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS real_leaks
FROM leaks;
